pi_items.source: setup_task.sh creates solar_terminal_config.txt with these exact folder names, and verifier.py checks for them in the EXPECTED_FOLDERS list.
setup_task.sh specifies 'Custom: 22' and verifier.py checks for font_size == 22 in Preferences.
setup_task.sh specifies 'Overlay Scrollbars' and 'Smooth Scrolling' flags, and verifier.py checks for 'overlay-scrollbars' and 'smooth-scrolling' in Local State.
setup_task.sh specifies shortcut keyword 'fault', and verifier.py checks for 'fault' in the SQLite Web Data keywords table.
setup_task.sh specifies URL 'https://www.inverter-faults-db.com/search?code=%s', and verifier.py checks for 'inverter-faults-db.com' in the SQLite Web Data url.
setup_task.sh specifies default download location '/home/ga/Documents/SCADA_Exports', and verifier.py checks for 'SCADA_Exports' in Preferences.
setup_task.sh specifies homepage 'https://www.caiso.com/...', and verifier.py checks for 'caiso.com' in Preferences.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Chrome bookmark data using an embedded python script in setup_task.sh. All metadata claims have been verified to exactly match the target configuration detailed in setup_task.sh's generated solar_terminal_config.txt and the evaluation logic in verifier.py. The expected folders are 'SCADA & Telemetry', 'Weather & Irradiance', 'Grid Market Data', and 'Equipment Docs'. The font size is set to 22. The expected flags are 'overlay-scrollbars' and 'smooth-scrolling'. The search keyword is 'fault' targeting 'inverter-faults-db.com'. The download directory is 'SCADA_Exports', and the homepage domain is 'caiso.com'.
